title: 日本ダービーの後に・誉

text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian dominates the Japanese Derby and
takes her second crown splendidly.

Expectations rise higher as whispers abound that
she might aim to become Triple Crown Champion.
Narita Brian's competitive fervor rises just as high.

Meanwhile, Hishi Amazon has just won the second
tiara on the Tiara tour. The two of them decide to
settle their rivalry at the Arima Kinen.

The challenge spikes Narita Brian's fighting spirit.
Before that match, however, we have the Kikuka
Sho—the final race of the Classic Triple Crown!
